# Support

This is a **small open-source / hackathon** project — there is no paid support desk.

## Getting help

1. Check [README.md](../README.md) for setup and routes.  
2. Search **existing issues** for duplicates.  
3. Open a **new issue** using `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` — include browser + reproduction steps for bugs.

## Response time

Maintainers may reply asynchronously. For event deadlines, mention the date in the issue title (factually, not as demand).

## Security-sensitive reports

Do **not** post exploit details in public issues. Use [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
